//: Pyright / Pylance config. Tells the language server about extra import-resolution paths so it can validate imports that work via runtime sys.path manipulation. Tool-agnostic: any editor's Pyright-based linter respects this file (VS Code, PyCharm, vim, etc.).
//comment_pythonVersion: Match the runtime Python version used in the Airflow container so type checks reflect what actually runs.
//comment_reportMissingImports: We expect some imports (apache-airflow's transitive deps) to be unresolvable locally because we only install --no-deps for IDE support. 'warning' instead of 'error' keeps the issue visible without blocking work.
